requirement_topic.en: ENRE / CAMMESA Grid Access for Utility or Transport-Connected PV
requirement_topic.zh: 公用事业或输电接入光伏的 ENRE / CAMMESA 并网准入
requirement_topic.zht: 公用事業或輸電接入光伏的 ENRE / CAMMESA 併網准入

summary.en: Argentina federal electricity regulation and ENRE practice control access and expansion issues for federal-jurisdiction transmission and distribution concessions. For large PV projects or projects affecting transport capacity, inverter evidence is only one part of a grid-access file that may require ENRE resolutions, CAMMESA studies or procedures, transport capacity review, protection studies, commissioning records, and project-specific operating settings.
summary.zh: 阿根廷联邦电力监管和 ENRE 实践控制联邦管辖输配电特许经营中的接入和扩建事项。对于大型光伏项目或影响输电容量的项目，逆变器证据只是并网准入资料的一部分，可能还需要 ENRE 决议、CAMMESA 研究或程序、输电容量审查、保护研究、调试记录和项目专用运行参数。
summary.zht: 阿根廷聯邦電力監管和 ENRE 實務控制聯邦管轄輸配電特許經營中的接入和擴建事項。對於大型光伏專案或影響輸電容量的專案，逆變器證據只是併網准入資料的一部分，可能還需要 ENRE 決議、CAMMESA 研究或程序、輸電容量審查、保護研究、調試記錄和專案專用運行參數。

standards_or_laws: ENRE access and transport-capacity resolutions where applicable
CAMMESA procedures and studies where applicable

summary.en: China grid files often cite GB/T 19964 for PV power-station grid connection, GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, NB/T 32004, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid acceptance records. Those records do not authorize access to the Argentina grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网文件通常引用 GB/T 19964 光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、GB/T 37408 光伏并网逆变器技术要求、NB/T 32004，以及国家电网或南方电网验收记录。这些记录不能授权接入阿根廷电网。
summary.zht: 中國併網文件通常引用 GB/T 19964 光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、GB/T 37408 光伏併網逆變器技術要求、NB/T 32004，以及國家電網或南方電網驗收記錄。這些記錄不能授權接入阿根廷電網。

gap.en: Separate product capability from grid approval. The Argentina project file should include the authority route, interconnection study assumptions, inverter model settings, reactive-power capability, anti-islanding functions, fault ride-through data where requested, and commissioning sign-off.
gap.zh: 应区分产品能力和并网批准。阿根廷项目文件应包括主管路径、并网研究假设、逆变器型号参数、无功能力、防孤岛功能、被要求时的故障穿越数据，以及调试签署。
gap.zht: 應區分產品能力和併網批准。阿根廷專案文件應包括主管路徑、併網研究假設、逆變器型號參數、無功能力、防孤島功能、被要求時的故障穿越資料，以及調試簽署。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project requires ENRE, CAMMESA, transporter, distributor, or project-owner grid approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid reports are supporting technical evidence only

source.publisher: Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad (ENRE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ENRE / CAMMESA grid acceptance is project-specific. China GB/T grid reports should be translated into the Argentina study package and settings file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ENRE / CAMMESA 并网接受具有项目特定性。中国 GB/T 并网报告应转化为阿根廷研究资料包和参数文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ENRE / CAMMESA 併網接受具有專案特定性。中國 GB/T 併網報告應轉化為阿根廷研究資料包和參數文件。

requirement_topic.en: Ley 27.424 Distributed Generation and Distributor Connection
requirement_topic.zh: Ley 27.424 分布式发电与配电公司接入
requirement_topic.zht: Ley 27.424 分散式發電與配電公司接入

summary.en: Ley 27.424 establishes Argentina's national framework for renewable distributed generation for self-consumption with possible surplus injection to the distribution grid, and official Argentina guidance describes the program as a regime for self-consumption and grid injection. Resolucion 235/2024 raised the maximum installed capacity for Greater User-Generators (individual, community, or virtual community) from 2 MW to 12 MW; surplus injection above 12 MW may be objected to by the distributor based on technical grid-safety studies. In practice, distributor enrollment, qualified installer work, platform documentation, meter arrangements, and provincial implementation status must be checked.
summary.zh: Ley 27.424 建立阿根廷可再生分布式发电国家框架，用于自发自用并可向配电网注入余电；阿根廷官方指南将该项目描述为自用和并网注入制度。Resolucion 235/2024 将大用户发电方（个人、社区或虚拟社区）的最大装机容量上限从 2 MW 提升至 12 MW；超过 12 MW 的余电注入可由配电公司依据电网安全性技术研究提出异议。实务中须核查配电公司登记、合格安装人员施工、平台文件、电表安排和省级实施状态。
summary.zht: Ley 27.424 建立阿根廷再生能源分散式發電國家框架，用於自發自用並可向配電網注入餘電；阿根廷官方指南將該項目描述為自用和併網注入制度。Resolucion 235/2024 將大用戶發電方（個人、社區或虛擬社區）的最大裝機容量上限從 2 MW 提升至 12 MW；超過 12 MW 的餘電注入可由配電公司依據電網安全性技術研究提出異議。實務中須核查配電公司登記、合格安裝人員施工、平台文件、電表安排和省級實施狀態。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 235/2024 (raises user-generator capacity limit from 2 MW to 12 MW for Greater User-Generators)

summary.en: China domestic distributed-PV acceptance, State Grid connection records, and GB/T inverter tests can support technical due diligence but do not prove enrollment as an Argentina user-generator or distributor acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内分布式光伏验收、国家电网接入记录和 GB/T 逆变器测试可支持技术尽调，但不能证明已登记为阿根廷用户发电方或已获配电公司接受。
summary.zht: 中國國內分散式光伏驗收、國家電網接入記錄和 GB/T 逆變器測試可支持技術盡調，但不能證明已登記為阿根廷用戶發電方或已獲配電公司接受。

gap.en: Before shipping, confirm whether the installation uses the national distributed-generation platform, a provincial route, or a distributor-specific process, then align inverter model, firmware profile, export limits, anti-islanding, labels, and Spanish manuals with that route.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认安装使用国家分布式发电平台、省级路径还是配电公司专用流程，然后使逆变器型号、固件配置、限发、防孤岛、标签和西班牙语说明书与该路径一致。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認安裝使用國家分散式發電平台、省級路徑還是配電公司專用流程，然後使逆變器型號、韌體配置、限發、防孤島、標籤和西班牙語說明書與該路徑一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects claiming or using the Ley 27.424 user-generator route; otherwise distributor and provincial requirements still need separate confirmation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed-PV acceptance is not recognized as Argentina distributor enrollment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ley 27.424 is a deployment route, not just a product standard. The inverter file should support the distributor and user-generator process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Ley 27.424 是部署路径，不只是产品标准。逆变器资料应支持配电公司和用户发电流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Ley 27.424 是部署路徑，不只是產品標準。逆變器資料應支持配電公司和用戶發電流程。
